title: CyberTip Triage — 90-Second Investigator Demo
description: A concise walkthrough of CyberTip Triage for ICAC task forces, demonstrating AI-powered prioritization, Wilson compliance automation, and warrant workflow integration.
target_audience: ICAC investigators and supervisors evaluating triage automation tools

cues.narration: Your task force receives hundreds of NeCMEC tips a month. Most are manually triaged, one at a time. CyberTip Triage changes that.
cues.caption: The tip volume problem

cues.narration: The dashboard gives you an immediate operational picture. Stats cards show total tips, pending warrants, and cases requiring immediate action.
cues.caption: Real-time operational overview

cues.narration: Every incoming tip is scored by AI and assigned a priority tier, from Immediate down to Monitor, based on victim crisis indicators.
Filter to Immediate tier to surface the highest-risk cases first. No more guessing which tip to open next.
cues.caption: Priority filtering

cues.narration: Select the top tip to open its detail pane. The system pulls in the full NeCMEC report automatically.
Notice the cluster alert. The system detected three other tips linked to the same viral incident and bundled them, eliminating duplicate work.
Scroll down to the legal guidance section. Circuit-specific analysis is generated for each tip so your actions stay on solid legal ground.
cues.caption: Circuit-specific legal guidance

cues.narration: Now let's look at the files tab. This is where Wilson compliance matters most.
When the ESP did not view an uploaded file, the system automatically blocks investigator access. This protects Fourth Amendment compliance at the organizational level.
cues.caption: Auto-blocked — ESP did not view

cues.narration: To access a blocked file, initiate the warrant workflow directly from this screen. Click to mark the warrant as applied.
The system tracks warrant status. Once granted, blocked files are automatically unblocked and the audit trail is fully documented.
cues.caption: Automatic unblock on grant

cues.narration: Supervisors get their own view with queue health metrics, compliance audit logs, and workload distribution across the task force.
cues.caption: Supervisor panel

cues.narration: On-call investigators can triage from the field using the mobile interface, with the same priority scoring and compliance safeguards.
CyberTip Triage. Faster prioritization. Built-in compliance. Every tip accounted for.
cues.caption: CyberTip Triage — Purpose-built for ICAC
